items.name: Orange Chicken
items.description: chicken breast / egg / cornstarch / canola oil / orange juice / sugar / rice vinegar / gluten free soy sauce / ginger / orange zest / chili flakes / green onion / sesame seeds / garlic jasmine rice / steamed bok choy

items.name: Orange Impossible Chicken
items.description: Impossible Chicken nuggets / egg / cornstarch / canola oil / orange juice / sugar / rice vinegar / gluten free soy sauce / ginger / orange zest / chili flakes / green onion / sesame seeds / garlic jasmine rice / steamed bok choy

items.name: Lentil Dahl
items.description: lentils onion garlic ginger spices vegetable broth basmati rice

items.name: Chicken 65
items.description: halal chicken thighs / garlic / ginger / paprika / curry leaves / cumin / coriander / corn starch / basmati rice / garlic naan / raita / mint chutney

items.name: Tofu 65
items.description: tofu / garlic / ginger / paprika / curry leaves / cumin / coriander / corn starch / basmati rice / garlic naan / raita / mint chutney

items.name: General Tso Chicken
items.description: halal chicken breast / ginger / garlic / egg / hoisin / tamari / sesame oil / green onions / corn starch / rice vinegar / sugar / oil / flour / jasmine rice / bok choy

items.name: General Tso Tofu
items.description: tofu / ginger / garlic / egg / hoisin / tamari / sesame oil / green onions / corn starch / rice vinegar / sugar / oil / flour / jasmine rice / bok choy

items.name: Pork Shoyu Ramen
items.description: braised pork belly / pork broth / bonito (dried tuna) / kombu / ginger / sake / mirin / gluten free soy sauce / onion / wakame seaweed / broccoli / corn / enoki mushrooms / bok choy / bamboo shoots / egg

items.name: Vegetable Shoyu Ramen
items.description: veggies / miso paste / vegetable broth / kombu / ginger / sake / mirin / gluten free soy sauce / onion / wakame seaweed / broccoli / corn / enoki mushrooms / bok choy / bamboo shoots / egg

items.name: Chinese-Style Chicken Wings
items.description: chicken wings / tamari / garlic / sugar / five spice / white rice / vegetable medley

items.name: Chinese-Style Grilled Vegetarian Steak
items.description: vegetarian flank steak / tamari / garlic / sugar / five spice / white rice / vegetable medley

items.name: Thai Basil Chicken
items.description: chicken / bell peppers / onion / basil / fish sauce / soy / oyster sauce / serrano peppers /coconut rice

items.name: Chicken Chow Mein
items.description: halal chicken thigh / egg / wheat noodles / shredded carrots / green onions / bean sprouts / bok choy / bell peppers / onion / garlic / ginger / tamari / sesame oil / sugar/ corn starch / chicken broth

items.name: Tofu Chow Mein
items.description: crispy tofu / egg / wheat noodles / shredded carrots / green onions / bean sprouts / bok choy / bell peppers / onion / garlic / ginger / tamari / sesame oil / sugar/ corn starch / vegetable broth

items.name: Chicken Katsu
items.description: breaded halal chicken  / katsu sauce (ketchup / Worcestershire / sugar) / shaved cabbage / sticky rice / Chinese broccoli

items.name: Impossible Chicken Katsu
items.description: Impossible Chicken / katsu sauce (ketchup / Worcestershire / sugar) / shaved cabbage / sticky rice / Chinese broccoli

items.name: Thai Basil Tofu
items.description: Hodo Soy Beanery organic tofu / bell peppers / onion / basil / vegan fish sauce / soy / serrano peppers /coconut rice

items.name: Mongolian Beef
items.description: skirt steak /  stir fried vegetables / ginger / garlic / agave / tamari / sriracha / green onion / onion / bamboo shoots / jasmine rice

items.name: Mongolian Soy Flank Steak
items.description: soy based flank steak / stir fried vegetables / ginger / garlic / agave / tamari / sriracha / green onion / onion / bamboo shoots / jasmine rice
